top_signals.title: Takaichi realizes imperial house law change by force of numbers
top_signals.summary: The common male ancestor of the former 11 imperial family branches and the current emperor goes back about 600 years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
